title: Callista guibertii
taxonomy: Callista guibertii is a species of saltwater clam within the family Veneridae. It is a marine bivalve mollusk found in tropical and subtropical waters. The classification of Callista guibertii is based on its shell and anatomical features. The species belongs to the kingdom Animalia, phylum Mollusca, class Bivalvia, order Veneroida, and family Veneridae. This classification helps scientists understand the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of Callista guibertii.
